ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Reset To May-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, Bailiff: R. Guitron.
Petitioner: Yesenia Pleitez, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Rudy Alex Garcia, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or proof of service on notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to May 6, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for an appearance of the Minor's Father.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
